description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a minimalist design, featuring a combination of concrete and white exterior surfaces. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, with large open terraces and green roof sections that provide outdoor living spaces. The front facade is defined by a prominent concrete wall and a recessed entryway, while the rear opens up to a spacious lawn area enclosed by low concrete walls. Expansive windows and sliding glass doors are visible, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The building sits on a raised platform, with paved walkways and integrated landscaping elements. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and functional, characteristic of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with concrete and white surfaces, large windows, and open terraces, set within landscaped lawns and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, concrete wall, and a small lawn area enclosed by low walls.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, green roof sections, and the extended paved area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large open lawn, terrace, and extensive windowed facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the main living area, terrace, and integrated landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
